title: trifolium prostratum
intro: Trifolium prostratum, also known as the creeping clover, is a perennial herb belonging to the pea family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Trifolium prostratum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
